sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT rpad(name, 10, 'XYZ') AS padded_name, value / 2 AS halved_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, rpad(name, (SELECT MAX(LENGTH(name)) FROM test_table), 'A') AS padded_name FROM test_table;
SELECT name, value FROM test_table WHERE LENGTH(rpad(name, 10, 'x')) > 5 ORDER BY value / 2 DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY rpad(name, 10, '0') HAVING value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, related_id INT, description VARCHAR(100), FOREIGN KEY (related_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT at.description, rt.value FROM another_table at JOIN test_table rt ON at.related_id = rt.id WHERE rt.name IS NOT NULL AND rpad(rt.name, 10, '-') LIKE '%--------';
SELECT SUM(rpad(name, 10, '-') / 1.0) AS decimal_sum FROM test_table GROUP BY name HAVING SUM(value) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, rpad(DISTINCT name, 10, 'X') AS unique_name FROM test_table;
